basic_details.job_title: ICMR-NIIRNCD Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR-NIIRNCD) Project Technical Support - III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website main.icmr.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR-NIIRNCD Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Central Government / DoPT / ICMR rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Ex-servicemen etc.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree with Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy/Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Statistics / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Zoology / Chemistry with 3 years' post-qualification experience, Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy/Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Statistics / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Zoology / Chemistry
qualification.details: Graduate degree with Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy/Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Statistics / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Zoology / Chemistry with 3 years' post-qualification experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy/Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Statistics / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Zoology / Chemistry.

salary_details.details: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA per month fixed without any other allowances.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Qualifying Skill Test wherever applicable Interview Merit List based on performance in written test and interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR-NIIRNCD Project Technical Support – III Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Project Technical Support – III.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technical Support – III position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree with 3 years of experience or a Post Graduate Degree in specified fields like Psychology, Public Health, Statistics, etc.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 35 years, with relaxations applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
